title: Pottery Perfection [Untrimmed]
description: This is the trimless version of Pottery Perfection.
body:
This is an alt version of **Pottery Perfection**! This simply removes the trims from undecorated pots

**Looking for the trimmed version? Download the regular pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pottery-perfection-untrimmed)!**

![Display of the untrimmed pottery textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51afdc74ae3d2d025a984f13a0bd5af320e6cce5.png)
